name: pave
description: Plan, Approve, Verify, Execute: a Codex plugin for session-based agentic development workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Plan, approve, verify, and execute software work.
interface.longDescription: PAVE provides a plugin-local session workflow for feature work, bug fixes, reviews, documentation sync, doctor, status, plan, verify, sync-docs, optional project initialization, and bounded specialist subagent briefs.
defaultPrompt: Plan and implement this feature with PAVE.
Initialize this repository with optional PAVE runtime files.
Check this repository with PAVE doctor.
